title: Eggciting Spawners
description: Replaces mini mobs in spawners with spawn eggs. Fully compatible with other mods and resource packs!
body:
This simple mod replaces mini mobs in spawners with their corresponding spawn eggs. It is also fully compatible with other mods and resource packs. How eggciting!
